title: Trump says Iran will ‘pay the price’ after it targets U.S. assets in three countries
summary_full: Hours after Iran announced a wave of strikes, President Donald Trump said Tehran had "taken too long to negotiate a deal that would have been great for them."
summary_public: Hours after Iran announced a wave of strikes, President Donald Trump said Tehran had "taken too long to negotiate a deal that would have been great for them."

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump says Iran will ‘pay the price’ after it targets U.S. assets
